title: Fix Admin Authorization & Full Bidirectional Data Sync (Admin ↔ User Panel)

requirements.text: Fix the backend admin authorization check so that the authenticated admin principal (the one used to log into the admin panel) is recognized as an authorized admin for all privileged operations. The 'Unauthorized: Only admins can create tournaments' error must be eliminated. The backend's admin principal list must be seeded or dynamically updated so the admin's Internet Identity principal is always authorized.

quotes: Unauthorized: Only admins can create tournaments

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create a tournament without receiving any 'Unauthorized' error
Admin can update, delete, and manage tournaments without authorization errors
All other admin-only backend functions (manage players, manage tickets, etc.) work without authorization errors

requirements.text: Fix the backend support tickets storage and retrieval so that tickets submitted by any player (via the user/player panel) are stored in the shared canister state and returned by the admin query for all support tickets. Admin panel Support Tickets section must display all tickets submitted by all users.
acceptanceCriteria: Support ticket submitted by a player is retrievable by the admin query
Admin panel Support Tickets section shows all tickets from all users, not just 0
Ticket status (open/closed) and user ID are displayed correctly in the admin panel

requirements.text: Fix the backend player/user registration storage so that all registered players are stored in canister state and returned by the admin query. Admin panel Players and Registrations sections must display all registered users and their tournament registrations.

quotes: Registrations aur Players sections mein bhi yahi issue hai

acceptanceCriteria: All registered players appear in the Admin panel Players section
All tournament registrations appear in the Admin panel Registrations section
Payment proofs submitted by users appear in the Admin panel Payment Proofs section
Withdrawal requests submitted by users appear in the Admin panel Withdrawals section

requirements.text: Add room details fields (Room ID and Room Password) to the tournament data model in the backend. Admin must be able to set/update the Room ID and Room Password for a tournament. These values must be returned in tournament query results so the user/player panel can display them.

quotes: room create se lekar youtube url sab theek karo
admin room create kare → User panel mein dikhe

acceptanceCriteria: Tournament data type includes roomId and roomPassword optional fields
Admin can set/update roomId and roomPassword for any tournament
Room details are returned in tournament queries accessible to players

requirements.text: Add a YouTube URL field to the tournament data model in the backend. Admin must be able to set/update a YouTube stream URL for any tournament. This value must be returned in tournament query results so the user/player panel can display it.

quotes: Admin set kare → User panel mein dikhe

acceptanceCriteria: Tournament data type includes an optional youtubeUrl field
Admin can set/update youtubeUrl for any tournament
YouTube URL is returned in tournament queries accessible to players

requirements.text: Update the Admin Dashboard page (AdminDashboardPage.tsx) to use the correct admin-authenticated actor for all data queries and mutations (tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, support tickets). Ensure all admin sections call backend queries that return full platform-wide data, not per-user filtered data. Fix the useQueries hooks used in the admin context to pass the admin actor instead of a user actor.

quotes: admin panel mein na to support ticket show ho raha na to registration mein koi user id show ho raha

acceptanceCriteria: Admin Tournaments section loads and displays all tournaments
Admin Registrations section loads and displays all tournament registrations
Admin Players section loads and displays all registered players
Admin Payment Proofs section loads and displays all submitted payment proofs
Admin Withdrawals section loads and displays all withdrawal requests
Admin Support Tickets section loads and displays all support tickets from all users

requirements.text: Update the Admin Dashboard tournament management UI to include fields for Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL when creating or editing a tournament. When admin saves these values, the mutation must call the backend update function. Display the current Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL in the tournament detail/edit view.

quotes: room create se lekar youtube url sab theek karo
admin kuch bhi banaye ya create kare to user panel me jaye

acceptanceCriteria: Tournament create/edit form in admin panel has Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL fields
Saving these fields persists them to the backend
Existing tournament edit view shows current values of Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL

requirements.text: Update the Player Dashboard (DashboardPage.tsx) Tournaments section to display Room ID and Room Password for tournaments the player has registered for. Also display the YouTube stream URL (as a clickable link) for each tournament if set by admin.

quotes: admin kuch bhi banaye ya create kare to user panel me jaye
room create se lekar youtube url sab theek karo

acceptanceCriteria: Player's registered tournaments show Room ID and Room Password when set by admin
YouTube URL appears as a clickable link/button in the tournament card for users
If Room ID/Password or YouTube URL is not set, the field is gracefully hidden or shows a placeholder

requirements.text: Add a migration file (backend/migration.mo) to safely upgrade the existing canister state to include the new tournament fields (roomId, roomPassword, youtubeUrl) without losing existing tournament, player, registration, or support ticket data.

quotes: room create se lekar youtube url sab theek karo

acceptanceCriteria: Canister upgrade does not lose any existing tournament, player, or registration data
Existing tournaments without room/YouTube fields default to null/empty values after migration
Migration compiles and applies cleanly

constraints: Do not change the admin login credential logic in AdminLoginPage.tsx
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo
Preserve all existing data types and backward compatibility in the backend
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket or push notification sync (polling via React Query is sufficient)
New UI theme or visual redesign
New user-facing features beyond room/YouTube display
Email or SMS notifications for admin/user actions
